title: Foldable Step Stool - 17 inch Height With Anti-Slip Rubber Grip Pimple, Safe Enough for Adults and Kids, Use in Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom, Garden, Garage, Office
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Homeshopa super strong folding step stool is made of durable plastic that will last a long time. The foldable stool is extremely strong, with a weight capacity of 150KG (330lb). Our folding step stool has been approved by EN 14183 Certificate, and all products have passed factory testing.

BUILT-IN CARRYING HANDLE: Ergonomic carrying handle makes folding and carrying simple. Simply lift the handle, and it will fold easily and quickly with one hand in a fraction of a second. The handle appears magically when the step stool is folded flat. Allowing you to comfortably carry it around and place it where you need it.

ANTI SLIP - This step up tool has special rubber dots on the surface and an anti-slip rubber strap on each foot for maximum foot grip and comfort. The stepping stool's unique, grip-dot textured surface makes it suitable for all users, including children. This safety feature makes the step stool ideal for a variety of applications, including the kitchen, bathroom, dining room, office, garden, camping, fishing, and more.

SPACE SAVING & PORTABLE - When folded, the collapsible step stools aim to save space. Its foldable design makes it extremely compact (only 2 inches wide). It can be kept almost anywhere. It folds and unfolds with a single motion, which is convenient when you have your other hand full.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Use our sturdy portable foldable step stool in the kitchen, bathroom, closets, garage, or anywhere else you need to easily access out-of-reach items. Sitting on it while doing various activities such as colouring, painting, eating, and so on. Ideal for cleaning the top of the refrigerator, changing light bulbs, and reaching high cabinets; ideal for anyone who needs a helping hand to reach the kitchen counter.
description: Not being able to reach the things you need can be frustrating. This Homeshopa Stepping Stool will make your life easier. Whether you're in the kitchen, the garage, or fixing up the house, there's always something in a difficult-to-reach place that you can't quite get to! This folding step stool comes in handy when you need a extra height and is safe and sturdy to use. Highly Durable Made from durable and polypropylene and built to last, super strong load capacity supports up to 300 lb. Solid Construction The sturdy construction makes it an ideal choice for kids as it provides the right height while ensuring. Compact Step Stool This folding step stool is lightweight and portable so you can easily move it around the house if required. Anti-slip Our step stool has anti-skid top and rubber feet designed for maximum grip , preventing slippage. Unique, grip-dot textured surface makes the folding step stool safe for everyone. Squash and Round Corner Protection This stepping stool has a safety stop gap feature that greatly improves rigidity and stability, making it ideal for children. To improve safety, corners have been rounded. Designed with safety in mind! Seat Size: 29 (W) x 22 (D) Height x 45cm (H) Bottom Closed Size Greater than 29cm (W) TBC Weight: 1.94kg
